sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: F5 Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against F5, Inc. - FFIV
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors of F5, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FFIV) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 to a lead plaintiff deadline of February 17, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges F5 and its executives failed to disclose material information between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, leading to a significant stock price drop after disappointing Q4 fiscal year 2025 results and a security breach involving its BIG-IP product were revealed. Investors are encouraged to seek legal options and learn more through ClaimsFiler.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. - ARE
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 to file lead plaintiff applications by January 26, 2026. This class action lawsuit alleges that Alexandria and its executives failed to disclose material information, leading to a significant stock price drop following the announcement of lower-than-expected Q3 2025 financial results. The decline was attributed to reduced occupancy rates, slower leasing, and a substantial real estate impairment charge.

feed.title: CarMax Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against CarMax, Inc. - KMX
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler reminds investors that the lead plaintiff deadline in a securities class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) is January 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges CarMax failed to disclose material information between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025, leading to an $11.5 per share drop following its Q2 FY2026 financial results announcement. Investors with losses exceeding $100,000 are encouraged to contact ClaimsFiler for evaluation of their legal options.

feed.title: NIO's battery asset operator Mirattery completes 1 billion yuan Series C round
feed.summary: Mirattery, NIO's battery asset operator, has successfully closed a Series C funding round, raising nearly 1 billion CNY. The financing includes new contributions from founding shareholders and state-owned capital investors, broadening support for its battery operations and R&D. Mirattery manages over 35 GWh of battery assets for more than 500,000 NIO users, central to NIO's Battery-as-a-Service model.

feed.title: The Eastern Company Declares 342nd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: The Eastern Company (NASDAQ: EML) announced its 342nd consecutive quarterly cash dividend of eleven cents ($0.11) per share. This dividend is payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. The company manages industrial businesses with operations in several countries.

feed.title: Hong Kong’s Operation Santa Claus boosted by Morgan Stanley’s enduring support
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is set to be Operation Santa Claus's top corporate supporter for the ninth consecutive year, reinforcing a 29-year partnership through its "building bridges" campaign. The firm contributed HK$8.8 million this year, benefiting multiple charities and disaster relief, illustrating its long-term commitment to community giving. This ongoing support reflects the company's belief in empathy, understanding, and shared responsibility.

feed.title: Thousands of Southeast Michigan residents without power due to ice on utility lines
feed.summary: Thousands of residents in Southeast Michigan are without power due to ice accumulating on utility lines, causing outages. DTE Energy is working to restore electricity for over 14,000 customers, with Consumers Energy reporting an additional 24,000 outages in Mid-Michigan. The freezing rain on Friday also created hazardous driving conditions.

feed.title: Key facts: Biohaven Ltd. develops BHV-7000 for epilepsy; J.P. Morgan reports poor trial results
feed.summary: Biohaven Ltd. (BHVN) is developing BHV-7000 for epilepsy, with analysts recommending a strong buy due to its potential and safety despite recent negative pipeline news. However, J.P. Morgan reported poor trial results for Biohaven, suggesting these results may not improve the company's fundamentals or market outlook. A data presentation for the drug is scheduled for January 2026.

feed.title: Thousands of Southeast Michigan residents without power due to ice on utility lines
feed.summary: Thousands of residents in Southeast Michigan are currently without power due to ice accumulating on utility lines following Friday's freezing rain. DTE Energy is working to restore service for over 14,000 customers, primarily in Oakland County, with Consumers Energy reporting outages for an additional 24,000 people in Mid-Michigan. Restoration for many DTE customers is expected between Friday night and early Saturday.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Stock (GS) Outlook: Year-End Rally, M&A Momentum, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs (GS) is ending 2025 with shares near $907, driven by a strong year-end market, a rebound in M&A and equity underwriting, and a more favorable regulatory environment for banks. Investors are looking for continued proof of performance, especially with analyst price targets often below current trading levels. Key watchpoints for early 2026 include interest rate shifts, continued dealmaking headlines, regulatory developments, and the company's Q4 2025 earnings report on January 15, 2026.

feed.title: MGM Grand to reopen Avenue Café in January
feed.summary: The MGM Grand in Las Vegas is reopening its popular Avenue Café in January, replacing the temporary Netflix BITES space. This breakfast and lunch restaurant will resume operations on January 12th, while Netflix BITES concludes its one-year run on January 4th. Other brunch options remain available at the resort.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Surged Following Strong Performance
feed.summary: TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) saw strong performance in Q3 2025, driven by faster-than-expected revenue growth in data centers and energy utilities, as well as margin expansion from its Industrial Solutions segment. Impax US Sustainable Economy Fund highlighted the stock, noting its 3.19% one-month return and 59.38% gain over the last 52 weeks, closing at $231.90 per share on December 24, 2025.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation, Inc. Stock Analysis: AI Growth and What’s Next
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) shows strong growth driven by AI integration in industrial automation, reflected in its surpassing analyst EPS expectations and a 39.29% year-to-date stock performance. While short-term projections by Meyka AI suggest a potential dip, the long-term outlook remains optimistic due to robust financials and strategic positioning. The company’s continued innovation in AI for manufacturing efficiency and safety positions it as a vital player in the industrial sector.

feed.title: Citigroup Stock (NYSE: C) News and Outlook: Citi’s 2025 Rally, Regulatory Relief, and What to Watch Before the Next Session
feed.summary: Citigroup (NYSE: C) is concluding 2025 with significant momentum, marked by a substantial stock rally driven by regulatory optimism and improved business trends. Despite market subdued at year-end, catalysts like a "turnaround" narrative gaining Wall Street buy-in and easing regulatory hurdles are attracting investors. The upcoming Q4 2025 earnings report on January 14, 2026, will be crucial for assessing continued progress and management's outlook for 2026.

feed.title: GOOG Stock Update: Alphabet Class C Shares in Focus After the $4.75B Intersect Deal, AI Spending Surge, and Antitrust Headlines
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (GOOG) are under investor scrutiny due to its strategic $4.75 billion acquisition of Intersect for AI infrastructure, rising capital expenditures, and ongoing regulatory pressures. The company's strong ad revenue and Cloud growth are positive, but escalating AI investment costs and significant antitrust actions in both the U.S. and EU pose key challenges. Investors are balancing the need for AI scale with capex discipline and the potential impact of regulatory remedies on Alphabet's business model.

feed.title: UiPath, Ramaco Resources And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures are slightly lower, but several companies are seeing significant movement in after-hours trading. UiPath (PATH) shares gained after announcing its entry into the S&P Midcap 400, while Ramaco Resources (METC) jumped following a $100 million stock repurchase plan. Citius Pharmaceuticals (CTXR) also showed strong gains after reporting better-than-expected earnings.

feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) stock is approaching record levels as 2025 ends, driven by a year-end rally, strong capital markets activity, and rising net interest income guidance. However, investors are keenly watching the bank's projected 2026 expenses, the impact of potential Federal Reserve rate cuts, and the upcoming Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings report. feed.summary: Apple Inc. (AAPL) closed trading at $273.40, navigating a mix of encouraging iPhone demand signals from China and increasing global regulatory challenges concerning its App Store and Apple Watch. Investors are closely monitoring strong Chinese shipment data and potential impacts from ongoing legal disputes and regulatory changes in Brazil, Italy, and the EU, which could affect Apple's Services profitability. Wall Street forecasts show an average price target around $283-$299, with investors awaiting further catalysts and Apple's Q1 2026 earnings around January 29, 2026.

feed.title: Traders Purchase High Volume of HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital Call Options (NYSE:HASI)

feed.title: Southpoint Trims Stake in Fennec Pharmaceuticals to 8%
feed.summary: Southpoint Capital Advisors LP has reduced its stake in Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc. (TSE:FRX), selling 1 million common shares at USD$7.50 each. Following this transaction, Southpoint now holds approximately 2.7 million common shares, representing about 8% of Fennec's fully diluted share base, and indicated that its holdings might change further. While Fennec shows strong revenue growth, profitability issues and a weak balance sheet remain concerns, according to TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark.

feed.title: Tesla Stock (TSLA) Update: Robotaxi Deadline, NHTSA Safety Probe, Wall Street Targets, and What Investors Should Watch Before the Next Session
feed.summary: Tesla (TSLA) stock closed lower, with concerns around a new NHTSA safety probe into Model 3 emergency door releases contrasting with ongoing optimism about robotaxi development, particularly after Elon Musk confirmed testing without safety monitors. Investors are also closely watching softening Q4 delivery expectations and the broader demand environment for EVs, while Wall Street price targets remain highly dispersed, reflecting varied evaluations of Tesla as a carmaker versus an AI/autonomy platform. Upcoming macro catalysts, Tesla-specific autonomy updates, and the Q4 deliveries report early next year are key events for investors to monitor in the coming sessions.

feed.title: GOOG Stock Today: Alphabet Class C Holds Near $315 After Holiday Session as AI Power Deals and Antitrust Risks Shape the 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (NASDAQ: GOOG) closed near $314.96 after the post-Christmas session, influenced by a mix of AI-driven capital expenditure, cloud momentum, and ongoing regulatory/antitrust headlines. Key developments include a $4.75 billion acquisition of Intersect to support AI infrastructure, a significant security partnership with Palo Alto Networks for Google Cloud, and the clearance of the Wiz acquisition by the U.S. Justice Department. Investors are also weighing AI copyright litigation and the impact of antitrust rulings, while looking ahead to the Q4 earnings report in early February 2026 for further insights into monetization and capex guidance.

feed.title: C aesars Sportsbook Opening 2026 in Rampart Casino Las Vegas
feed.summary: C aesars Entertainment and Rampart Casino are partnering to open a new Caesars Sportsbook at The Resort at Summerlin in 2026, pending regulatory approval. The new sportsbook will replace the existing one and feature state-of-the-art technology, including a 360-degree LED video wall and 20 self-service betting kiosks. This expansion aims to meet the demand for high-quality sports betting in the Summerlin community, leveraging Caesars' proprietary technology and its Universal Digital Wallet.

feed.title: Is FGI Industries (FGI) Stock Outpacing Its Retail-Wholesale Peers This Year?
feed.summary: FGI Industries Ltd. (FGI) has significantly outperformed its Retail-Wholesale sector peers and its specific Retail - Home Furnishings industry this year, returning 80.4% year-to-date compared to the sector's 7.2% average. The company currently holds a Zacks Rank of #1 (Strong Buy), with its full-year earnings consensus estimate increasing by 37.5% over the past three months, indicating strong analyst sentiment. Investors interested in Retail-Wholesale stocks should monitor FGI and Expedia (EXPE), another strong performer in the sector.

feed.title: Super Hi International Holding stock hits 52-week low at 16.3 USD
feed.summary: Super Hi International Holding Ltd ADR has reached a 52-week low with its stock price dipping to 16.3 USD, representing a significant decline of 39.88% over the past year and 42.35% year-to-date. Despite this, the company maintains a "GOOD" financial health rating according to InvestingPro data, and analysts suggest the stock may be undervalued with price targets ranging from 21.30 USD to 22 USD. The company is profitable with 8.02% revenue growth and holds more cash than debt.

feed.title: Tapestry's David L. Casey Named Among Engagedly Inc.'s Top 100 HR Influencers of 2022
feed.summary: David L. Casey, Tapestry's Chief Inclusion and Social Impact Officer, has been recognized as one of Engagedly Inc.'s "Top 100 HR Influencers of 2022." This acknowledgment highlights his crucial role in fostering Tapestry's culture and advancing its Equity, Inclusion, & Diversity (EI&D) and community impact initiatives. This is the sixth annual list noting influential HR leaders.

feed.title: Netflix Stock (NFLX) Today: Shares End the Week Firm as Warner Bros. Discovery Deal, Ad Growth and Earnings Take Center Stage
feed.summary: Netflix (NFLX) shares closed the week firm as investors focused on three key drivers: a proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) assets, the acceleration of its advertising strategy, and its upcoming earnings report on January 20, 2026. The WBD deal, valued at $59 billion, presents both significant opportunities for Netflix to expand its content library and studio footprint, as well as risks related to financing, regulatory scrutiny, and integration. Meanwhile, Netflix’s advertising division continues to show strong growth, reaching over 190 million monthly active viewers globally and developing dynamic ad insertion technologies, positioning it as a crucial element for future monetization and valuation.

feed.title: Merck & Co. Is Honored to Be Named to Forbes America's Best Employers List for the Eighth Year in a Row.
feed.summary: Merck & Co. has been recognized on Forbes America's Best Employers list for the eighth consecutive year, ranking in the top 50 overall and second in the Drugs & Biotechnology Industry. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to diversity, inclusion, and significant contributions to global health through its biopharmaceutical innovations.

feed.title: Merck & Co. Listed as One of the Top 50 Employers by CAREERS & The DisABLED Magazine
feed.summary: Merck & Co. has been recognized as one of the Top 50 Employers by CAREERS & the disABLED Magazine, an achievement attributed to their commitment to employee potential across all dimensions of ability. This acknowledgment highlights Merck's dedication to diversity and inclusion, further detailed in their Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Progress Report. As a global biopharmaceutical company, Merck continues to prioritize innovative health solutions and access to healthcare worldwide.

feed.title: Intelligent Living announces 1-for-10 reverse stock split By Investing.com
feed.summary: Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (NASDAQ:ILAG) has announced a 1-for-10 reverse stock split, effective December 30, 2025, to meet Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirements. The company, a Hong Kong-based lockset manufacturer, has seen its stock drop significantly year-to-date and is experiencing financial weakness despite a recent short-term return. Post-split, the number of ordinary and preferred shares will decrease, while shareholders' proportional ownership will remain largely unchanged.

feed.title: Short Interest in Jiayin Group Inc. Sponsored ADR (NASDAQ:JFIN) Drops By 63.6%
feed.summary: Jiayin Group Inc. Sponsored ADR (NASDAQ:JFIN) experienced a significant 63.6% drop in short interest as of December 15th, totaling 96,954 shares. This represents approximately 0.4% of the company's stock sold short, with a days-to-cover ratio of 0.7 days. Institutional ownership remains strong at 44.08%, with several firms acquiring or increasing their stakes in Jiayin Group.

feed.title: AG reaches settlement with PayPal over deceptive practices
feed.summary: The New Hampshire Attorney General’s Office has reached a $1.75 million settlement with PayPal over deceptive practices related to its e-payment platforms, PayPal and Venmo. The settlement mandates significant changes to ensure transparency regarding access to funds, clearer purchase protection terms, enhanced privacy settings for Venmo users, and risk-based scam warnings. Attorney General John L. Formella highlighted the importance of transparency for companies handling consumers' financial resources, especially for low-income individuals.

feed.title: Amazon.com Stock (AMZN) News Today: After‑Hours Price, AWS AI Catalysts, Analyst Targets, and What to Watch Before the Next Session
feed.summary: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) closed a quiet post-Christmas session, with its shares trading flat at around $232.52 in extended hours. Going into 2026, investors are focused on Amazon Web Services (AWS) growth and AI compute infrastructure, including new AI chip technologies and project Rainier, while also considering regulatory challenges in retail and cloud services. Analysts remain largely bullish on AMZN, with average price targets suggesting significant upside, despite concerns about massive AI capital expenditure and regulatory scrutiny.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson will appeal talcum powder ruling
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson plans to appeal a ruling that ordered the company to pay $1.5 billion to a woman. The woman alleged that decades of exposure to Johnson & Johnson's talcum powder caused her cancer.

feed.title: INHD Stock Faces Volatility Amid Financial Turbulence​
feed.summary: Inno Holdings Inc. (INHD) is experiencing significant stock volatility despite a recent 7.25% uptick, driven by global market expansion news. The company faces financial challenges including negative profit margins, asset inefficiency, and substantial operating expenses, yet maintains operational stability due to a robust cash reserve and strategic stock issuance. Investors remain cautious, awaiting clear signs of recovery and strategic shifts to ensure long-term profitability amidst an otherwise mixed financial outlook.

feed.title: Stocks Stall Despite Healthy Christmas Week Wins
feed.summary: Despite a daily loss for the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq, which snapped five-day win streaks due to low-volume profit-taking, all three indices secured weekly gains, with the S&P 500 even hitting an intraday record. Safe-haven assets like gold and silver (which climbed above $75 per ounce for the first time ever) saw significant gains, while oil prices dipped amid geopolitical discussions regarding a potential ceasefire in Ukraine. The article highlights market movements including Micron's erratic trading and focuses on biotech stocks, set against a backdrop of the Cboe Volatility Index remaining in annual low territory.

feed.title: AI is not replacing agents, it’s redefining real estate leadership with Kim Tran
feed.summary: This episode of Ten Minute Talks features Brena Nath and Kim Tran, Senior Vice President of Learning & Development at Anywhere Real Estate Inc., discussing how AI is reshaping the real estate industry. They explore practical, field-tested examples of how agents are using AI to automate tasks, scale innovation, and strengthen client relationships. The conversation emphasizes that AI serves as a thought partner, enabling agents to stay competitive and grow.

feed.title: Highway Holdings’ Bold Strategy: Acquiring 51% of Regent-Feinbau to Enter Chinese Auto Market
feed.summary: Highway Holdings Limited announced its plan to acquire a 51% stake in Germany-based Regent-Feinbau Adermann GmbH, a move that sent its stock up by 7.14%. This strategic acquisition aims to facilitate Highway Holdings' entry into China's automotive market by March 2026, leveraging Regent-Feinbau's precision sheet metal manufacturing expertise. The deal, pending due diligence, is expected to enhance Highway Holdings' manufacturing capabilities and market footprint in the growing Chinese auto sector.

feed.title: Class Action Filed Against Coupang, Inc. (CPNG) - February 17, 2026 Deadline to Join – Contact Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Coupang, Inc. (CPNG), alleging securities fraud for investors affected between August 6, 2025, and December 16, 2025. The lawsuit claims Coupang concealed a cybersecurity breach and failed to report it in compliance with SEC rules, making their public statements misleading. Investors have until February 17, 2026, to request lead plaintiff status.
